name: Baked Cheese Grits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (moderate).
2. Grease a 2-quart baking dish.
3. Add salt to water. Bring to a full, rolling boil.
4. Add grits; return to boiling point. Cook, stirring constantly, until very thick, about 6 minutes.
5. Remove from heat. Add fat. Mix cheese, eggs, and pepper. Stir into grits.
6. Pour into baking dish.
7. Bake for 40 minutes or until lightly browned.
